violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cooking equipment and refrigerated units, outer surfaces, were found dirty. These items should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation system was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Removal frequency of refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Refuse, recyclables, and returnables were not removed from the premises at a frequency to minimize odors and conditions that attract insects and rodents. Multiple empty cardboard boxes were found throughout the kitchen. Boxes should be discarded more frequently.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor throughout kitchen found dirty. Floor should be cleaned more thoroughly.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Equipment surfaces throughout the kitchen found in need of cleaning. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring throughout the kitchen was found dirty, especially under equipment. Flooring should be more thoroughly cleaned.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
